description_long: This is a vintage-style metal lantern with a cylindrical body and a prominent circular lens at the front, reminiscent of old railway or street lanterns. The lantern features a domed top with a vented cap and a sturdy, arched carrying handle attached to the upper section. On either side of the main body, there are symmetrical protrusions, likely for structural reinforcement or additional light emission. The surface is weathered, showing signs of age and use, with a matte, dark metallic finish. The front lens appears to be made of glass, slightly tinted, and is set within a robust metal frame. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on durability and function.
description: A weathered, vintage metal lantern with a domed top, arched handle, and a prominent circular glass lens at the front. The lantern has a utilitarian, robust design with a dark, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular glass lens, domed top, and arched handle clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the lantern, with the handle and vented cap visible, but no glass lens.
description_view_2: Front-left angled view, showing the lens, side protrusions, and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear-left angled view, focusing on the back and side structure, with the handle and vented top prominent.
